title: Personal Cognitive Continuity Hosted Consumer Integration
description: Integrate the personal continuity lane with elevated consent, privacy, and human-agency controls under hosted consumer boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: Personal-state lifecycle supports history, context transitions, correction, and retraction
Consent and privacy controls are enforced with fail-closed behavior and explicit receipts
Temporal authority and memory reconstruction preserve lineage without authority fabrication
Human decision authority supersedes generic platform defaults for personal lanes
Boundary and adversarial tests verify privacy and consent protections under replay and recovery
